title: erigeron oreophilus
intro: Erigeron oreophilus, also known as the mountain fleabane or alpine fleabane, is a species of flowering plant in the daisy family (Asteraceae) that is native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The plant is believed to have health benefits such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and treating respiratory issues, making it a popular herbal remedy. Erigeron oreophilus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, and is also used in folk medicine to treat a range of ailments.
